{{< include latex-macros/macros.qmd >}}

## Odds and log-odds

:::{#def-odds-summary}
#### Odds (@def-odds)
$$\odds \eqdef \frac{\Pr(A)}{\Pr(\neg A)}$$
:::

:::{#def-c-odds-summary}
#### Conditional odds (@def-c-odds)
$$\odds(B) \eqdef \frac{\Pr(A|B)}{\Pr(\neg A|B)}$$
:::

:::{#def-odds-fn-summary}
#### Odds function (@def-odds-fn)
$$\oddsf{\pi} \eqdef \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$$
:::

:::{#thm-prob-to-odds-summary}
#### Probability to odds (@thm-prob-to-odds)
$$\odds = \frac{\prob}{1-\prob}$$
:::

:::{#thm-odds-simplified-summary}
#### Simplified expressions for odds function (@thm-odds-simplified)
$$
\ba
\oddsf{\pi}
   &= \frac{1}{\pi^{-1}-1}
\\ &= \invf{\pi^{-1}-1}
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#cor-oddsf-to-odds-summary}
#### Odds function equals odds (@cor-oddsf-to-odds)
$$\odds = \oddsf{\prob}$$
:::

:::{#cor-odds-neg-summary}
#### Odds of a non-event (@cor-odds-neg)
$$
\ba
\odds(\neg A)
   &= \frac{1-\pi}{\pi}
\\ &= \pi^{-1}-1
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#def-OR-summary}
#### Odds ratio (@def-OR)
$$\theta(\odds_1, \odds_2) \eqdef \frac{\odds_1}{\odds_2}$$
:::

:::{#thm-or-ratio-ratio-summary}
#### Odds ratio as a ratio of probability ratios (@thm-or-ratio-ratio)
$$
\ba
\theta(\odds_1, \odds_2)
   &= \frac{\odds_1}{\odds_2}
\\ &= \frac{\paren{\frac{\pi_1}{1-\pi_1}}}{\paren{\frac{\pi_2}{1-\pi_2}}}
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#thm-or-swap-summary}
#### Odds ratios are reversible (@thm-or-swap)
For any two events $A$, $B$:
$$\theta(A|B) = \theta(B|A)$$
:::

:::{#thm-conditional-OR-swap-summary}
#### Conditional odds ratios are reversible (@thm-conditional-OR-swap)
For any three events $A$, $B$, $C$:
$$\theta(A|B,C) = \theta(B|A,C)$$
:::

## Inverse-odds and probability recovery

:::{#thm-odds-to-prob-summary}
#### Odds to probability (@thm-odds-to-prob)
$$\pi = \frac{\odds}{1+\odds}$$
:::

:::{#def-inv-odds-summary}
#### Inverse-odds function (@def-inv-odds)
$$\invoddsf{\odds} \eqdef \frac{\odds}{1 + \odds}$$
:::

:::{#cor-invodds-pi-summary}
#### Probability as inverse-odds (@cor-invodds-pi)
$$\prob = \invoddsf{\odds}$$
:::

:::{#cor-invodds-odds-inv-summary}
#### Inverse-odds and inverse functions (@cor-invodds-odds-inv)
$$\invoddsf{\odds} = \oddsinvf{\odds}$$
:::

:::{#lem-invodds-simplified-summary}
#### Simplified expressions for inverse-odds (@lem-invodds-simplified)
$$
\ba
\invoddsf{\odds}
   &= \frac{1}{1+\odds^{-1}}
\\ &= (1+\odds^{-1})^{-1}
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#lem-one-minus-odds-inv-summary}
#### One minus inverse-odds (@lem-one-minus-odds-inv)
$$1 - \prob = \frac{1}{1+\odds}$$
:::

:::{#cor-inverse-odds-nonevent-summary}
#### Complement of inverse-odds (@cor-inverse-odds-nonevent)
$$1+\odds = \frac{1}{1-\prob}$$
:::

## Log-odds (logit) and expit

:::{#def-logodds-summary}
#### Log-odds (@def-logodds)
$$\logodds \eqdef \logf{\omega}$$
:::

:::{#thm-logodds-pi-summary}
#### Log-odds from probability (@thm-logodds-pi)
$$\logodds = \logf{\frac{\prob}{1-\prob}}$$
:::

:::{#def-logit-fn-summary}
#### Logit function (@def-logit-fn)
$$\logit(\prob) \eqdef \logf{\oddsf{\prob}}$$
:::

:::{#thm-logit-function-summary}
#### Expanded expression for logit (@thm-logit-function)
$$\logit(\prob) = \logf{\frac{\prob}{1-\prob}}$$
:::

:::{#cor-logodds-logit-summary}
#### Log-odds equals logit (@cor-logodds-logit)
$$\logodds = \logitf{\prob}$$
:::

:::{#lem-odds-from-logodds-summary}
#### Odds from log-odds (@lem-odds-from-logodds)
$$\odds = \expf{\logodds}$$
:::

:::{#thm-prob-from-logodds-summary}
#### Probability from log-odds (@thm-prob-from-logodds)
$$\prob = \frac{\expf{\eta}}{1+\expf{\eta}}$$
:::

:::{#def-expit-summary}
#### Expit / inverse-logit / logistic function (@def-expit)
$$\expit(\logodds) \eqdef \invoddsf{\expf{\logodds}}$$
:::

:::{#thm-expit-expressions-summary}
#### Expressions for expit function (@thm-expit-expressions)
$$
\ba
\expit(\logodds)
   &= \frac{\exp{\logodds}}{1+\exp{\logodds}}
\\ &= \frac{1}{1 + \exp{-\logodds})}
\\ &= (1 + \exp{-\logodds})^{-1}
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#thm-expit-prob-logodds-summary}
#### Probability as expit of log-odds (@thm-expit-prob-logodds)
$$\prob = \expitf{\logodds}$$
:::

:::{#thm-logit-expit-summary}
#### Logit and expit are inverses (@thm-logit-expit)
$$\logitf{\expitf{\logodds}} = \logodds$$
$$\expitf{\logitf{\pi}} = \pi$$
:::

## Rare events

:::{#thm-odds-minus-probs-summary}
#### Odds minus probability (@thm-odds-minus-probs)
Let $\odds = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$. Then:
$$\odds - \pi = \frac{\pi^2}{1-\pi}$$
:::

## Derivatives

:::{#thm-deriv-odds-summary}
#### Derivative of odds function (@thm-deriv-odds)
$$\doddsf{\prob} = \derivf{\odds}{\prob} = \frac{1}{\sqf{1-\prob}}$$
:::

:::{#cor-deriv-odds-summary}
#### Alternative form of odds derivative (@cor-deriv-odds)
$$\derivf{\odds}{\prob} = \sqf{1+\odds}$$
:::

:::{#thm-deriv-invodds-summary}
#### Derivative of inverse-odds function (@thm-deriv-invodds)
$$\dinvoddsf{\odds} = \derivf{\prob}{\odds} = (1-\prob)^2 = \frac{1}{\sqf{1+\odds}}$$
:::

:::{#lem-d_logodds-d_odds-summary}
#### Derivative of log-odds by odds (@lem-d_logodds-d_odds)
$$\derivf{\logodds}{\odds} = \odds^{-1}$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_logodds-d_odds-summary}
#### Derivative of log-odds by odds (in terms of probability) (@thm-d_logodds-d_odds)
$$\derivf{\logodds}{\odds} = \frac{1-\pi}{\pi}$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_logodds-d_prob-summary}
#### Derivative of log-odds by probability (@thm-d_logodds-d_prob)
$$\derivf{\logodds}{\prob} = \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}$$
:::

:::{#cor-deriv-logit-summary}
#### Derivative of logit function (@cor-deriv-logit)
$$\logit'(\prob) = \frac{1}{(\prob)(1-\prob)}$$
:::

:::{#lem-deriv-invodds-summary}
#### Derivative of odds by log-odds (@lem-deriv-invodds)
$$\derivf{\odds}{\logodds} = \odds$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_odds-d_logodds-summary}
#### Derivative of odds by log-odds (in terms of probability) (@thm-d_odds-d_logodds)
$$\derivf{\omega}{\eta} = \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_prob-d_logodds-summary}
#### Derivative of probability by log-odds (@thm-d_prob-d_logodds)
$$\derivf{\prob}{\logodds} = \pi (1-\pi)$$
:::

:::{#cor-d_pi-d_eta-var-summary}
#### Derivative of probability by log-odds equals variance (@cor-d_pi-d_eta-var)
If $\pi = \Pr(Y=1| \vX=\vx)$, then:
$$\derivf{\pi}{\eta} = \Varf{Y|X=x}$$
:::

:::{#lem-d_logodds-d_x-summary}
#### Derivative of log-odds by covariates (@lem-d_logodds-d_x)
$$\derivf{\logodds}{\vx} = \vb$$
:::

:::{#lem-d_logodds-d_vb-summary}
#### Derivative of log-odds by coefficients (@lem-d_logodds-d_vb)
$$\derivf{\eta}{\vb} = \vx$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_odds_d_beta-summary}
#### Derivative of odds by coefficients (@thm-d_odds_d_beta)
$$
\ba
\derivf{\odds}{\vb}
   &= \vx \odds
\ea
$$
:::

:::{#cor-d_odds_d_beta-summary}
#### Derivative of odds by coefficients (in terms of probability) (@cor-d_odds_d_beta)
$$\derivf{\odds}{\vb} = \vx \frac{\pi}{1-\pi}$$
:::

:::{#thm-d_pi_d_beta-summary}
#### Derivative of probability by coefficients (@thm-d_pi_d_beta)
$$
\ba
\derivf{\prob}{\vb}
   &= \vx \prob (1-\prob)
\ea
$$
:::

## Log-likelihood

:::{#lem-logistic-loglik-component-summary}
#### Log-likelihood component (@lem-logistic-loglik-component)
$$\ell_i(\pi_i) = y_i \eta_i - \logf{1+\odds_i}$$
:::

## Score function

:::{#lem-score-logistic-summary}
#### Score function as sum (@lem-score-logistic)
$$\vec{\llik'}(\vb) = \sumin \vec{\llik'_i}(\vb)$$
:::

:::{#thm-logistic-score-comp-summary}
#### Score function component (@thm-logistic-score-comp)
$$\llik_i'(\vb) = \vx_i \err_i$$
:::

:::{#thm-logistic-score-fn-summary}
#### Score function (@thm-logistic-score-fn)
$$\vec{\llik'}(\vb) = \sumin \vx_i\eps_i = \mX'\veps$$
:::

## MLE

:::{#thm-est-odds-summary}
#### One-sample MLE for odds (@thm-est-odds)
$$\hat{\odds}= \frac{x}{n-x}$$
:::

## Odds ratios in logistic regression

:::{#lem-logistic-OR-summary}
#### General OR formula (@lem-logistic-OR)
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \expf{\logodds(\vx) - \logodds(\vxs)}$$
:::

:::{#def-difflogodds-summary}
#### Difference in log-odds (@def-difflogodds)
$$\difflogodds \eqdef \logodds(\vx) - \logodds(\vxs)$$
:::

:::{#cor-logistic-OR-summary}
#### OR in terms of difference in log-odds (@cor-logistic-OR)
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \expf{\difflogodds}$$
:::

:::{#lem-diff-logodds-summary}
#### Difference in log-odds from covariates (@lem-diff-logodds)
$$\difflogodds = (\vx - \vxs)\cdot\vb$$
:::

:::{#def-diff-covs-summary}
#### Difference in covariate patterns (@def-diff-covs)
$$\diffvx \eqdef \vx - \vxs$$
:::

:::{#cor-diff-logodds-summary}
#### Difference in log-odds from covariate difference (@cor-diff-logodds)
$$\difflogodds = \diffvx \cdot \vb$$
:::

:::{#thm-logistic-OR-summary}
#### OR in terms of covariate difference (@thm-logistic-OR)
$$\ror(\vx,\vxs) = \exp{(\diffvx) \cdot \vb}$$
:::

:::{#cor-log-or-summary}
#### Log OR equals difference in log-odds (@cor-log-or)
$$\logf{\ror(\vx,\vxs)} = \difflogodds$$
:::

## Inference for log-odds and odds ratios

:::{#thm-est-se-logodds-summary}
#### Estimated variance and SE of log-odds (@thm-est-se-logodds)
$$\hVar{\hat\logodds(\vx)} = \tp{\vx}\hat{\Sigma}\vx$$
$$\HSE{\hat\logodds(\vx)} = \sqrt{\tp{\vx}\hat{\Sigma}\vx}$$
:::

:::{#thm-est-se-diff-logodds-summary}
#### Estimated variance and SE of difference in log-odds (@thm-est-se-diff-logodds)
$$\hVar{\Delta{\hat\logodds}} = \tp{\diffvx}\hat{\Sigma}(\diffvx)$$
$$\HSE{\Delta{\hat\logodds}} = \sqrt{\tp{\diffvx}\hat{\Sigma}(\diffvx)}$$
:::

## Comparing probabilities

:::{#def-RD-summary}
#### Risk difference (@def-RD)
$$\delta(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \pi_1 - \pi_2$$
:::

:::{#def-RR-summary}
#### Risk ratio / relative risk (@def-RR)
$$\rho(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \frac{\pi_1}{\pi_2}$$
:::

:::{#def-RRD-summary}
#### Relative risk difference (@def-RRD)
$$\xi(\pi_1,\pi_2) \eqdef \frac{\delta(\pi_1,\pi_2)}{\pi_2}$$
:::

:::{#thm-rrd-vs-rr-summary}
#### Relative risk difference equals risk ratio minus 1 (@thm-rrd-vs-rr)
$$\xi(\pi_1,\pi_2) = \rho(\pi_1,\pi_2) - 1$$
:::

## Logistic regression model

:::{#def-logistic-regression-summary}
#### Logistic regression (@def-logistic-regression)
**Logistic regression** models binary outcomes conditional on one or more predictors,
using the Bernoulli distribution:
$$
\ba
Y_i|\vX_i &\simind \Ber(\pi(\vX_i))
\\
\logitf{\pi(\vx)} &= \vx'\vb
\ea
$$
:::
